productVision.title: Lane No. 5: The Digital Pulse of Pune's Late-Night Sanctuary
productVision.statement: To translate the raw, energetic pulse and authentic street-side comfort of Lane No. 5 – Pune's definitive late-night urban sanctuary – into a cinematic, immersive, and operationally transparent digital experience. Our vision is to extend the sensory richness of sizzling shawarma, steaming chai, and vibrant street life, establishing the online presence as a direct, honest, and high-fidelity reflection of the physical establishment, serving post-midnight cravings and morning rituals with unpretentious excellence.

experienceGoals.goal: Cultivate an authentic, immersive digital atmosphere that mirrors the physical experience of Lane No. 5, emphasizing the high-contrast lighting, steam, and sizzle.
metrics: User engagement duration on hero video
Bounce rate reduction from landing page

experienceGoals.goal: Establish immediate operational transparency and build trust through real-time, verifiable information on service hours, location, and popular offerings.
metrics: Click-through rate on 'LIVE: SERVING UNTIL 3:00 AM' badge
Accuracy of listed operating hours vs. actual operations

experienceGoals.goal: Ignite sensory cravings and immediate hunger through visually rich, macro-focused content and evocative micro-interactions that highlight product quality and preparation.
metrics: Engagement with food photography and video sections
Conversion rate from menu view to ordering channels
Time spent on 'The Core Rotation' section

experienceGoals.goal: Provide effortless and direct access to ordering, location, and operational details, reflecting the 'fast-paced, high-turnaround urban energy' of the business.
metrics: Mobile usability scores for quick access functions

homepageHero.purpose: To immediately immerse the user in the core atmosphere and communicate real-time operational status, setting a cinematic tone.

visualMedia.content: Seamless sequence: carving knife slicing juicy chicken from the spinning shawarma spit (focus on texture, juice, motion) seamlessly transitioning into a high-angle pour of steaming Irani chai (focus on steam, liquid texture, clay cup).
visualMedia.cinematicEffect: High-contrast, low-light setting making the food action pop, accompanied by subtle ambient sound (optional, user-initiated) of sizzle and steam.

dynamicHeroBadge.style: Pulsing neon-orange indicator, subtle glow animation, dynamically updated via real-time data to reflect open/closed status.
dynamicHeroBadge.interaction: Clicking reveals detailed operating hours and daily specials calendar.

primaryCallToAction.action: Triggers a geo-aware modal with options for 'Directions (Dine-in/Drive-through)', 'Order for Pickup', or 'Order for Delivery' via integrated platforms (e.g., Swiggy/Zomato links for delivery, internal system for pickup). Contextually suggests fastest option based on user location.
primaryCallToAction.style: SANS-SERIF-BOLD-CONDENSED, high-impact button with a subtle, responsive press effect.

scrollChoreography.description: Upon initial scroll past the hero, the vibrant, energetic 'Core Rotation' section slides into view with a fast, almost 'cut' like transition, mimicking the abrupt, high-energy pace of street-side service. Elements within the cards animate into focus with a quick, decisive bounce.

Horizontal scroll of food cards features a parallax effect on background elements, creating depth. As each card centers, its associated micro-detail (e.g., steam from chai, sizzle particles from shawarma) subtly animates and gains focus, drawing attention to sensory attributes.

Transition from 'The Core Rotation' to 'Lane No. 5 Energy' uses a vertical wipe, revealing the grid of 'real scenes' as if pulling back a curtain to show the behind-the-scenes pulse of the establishment. Grid items load with a staggered fade-in, emphasizing the 'real-time' aspect.

interactiveSections.title: The Core Rotation
interactiveSections.subtitle: No massive menu books. Just high-velocity, high-satisfaction street-side staples done right.
interactiveSections.uiMechanism: Horizontally scrollable high-contrast cards. Each card prominently features a hero image (macro photography) and crisp typography for the item name and a succinct description (e.g., 'Shawarma: Juicy chicken roasted slow, seasoned sharp, and wrapped tight.'). Hovering over a 'Shawarma' card triggers a subtle, ambient sizzling sound effect and a light glow. For 'Irani Chai,' a subtle CSS-driven steam effect rises from the cup.

interactiveSections.title: Lane No. 5 Energy
interactiveSections.subtitle: Real scenes from the corner shop.
interactiveSections.uiMechanism: Dynamic, responsive grid layout. Cells display: 1) Curated, real-time social media snippets (customer sentiment highlights with user-generated photos/videos, vetted for authenticity). 2) Live data visualization of popular late-night hours (e.g., heat map or graph showing peak traffic). 3) An embedded, interactive map centered on the Airport Road / Sanjay Park intersection, with a pulsing location marker. Clicking the map initiates quick-route directions.

footer.layout: Utilitarian dashboard format. Displays essential, verified facts with MONOSPACE-STREET-CLEAN typography: 'Operating Hours: CLOSES 3:00 AM', 'Phone: 085510 61614', 'Address: [Full Address]', and a 'Quick-Route Drive-Through' button linking directly to navigation apps. All data points are interactable for quick calls or map launches. No unnecessary branding or fluff, purely functional.

globalPrinciples.speed: Generally fast and decisive, mirroring high-volume operations, with strategic moments of slow-motion for sensory focus.
globalPrinciples.easing: Sharp `ease-out` for general UI, `ease-in-out` for smoother cinematic transitions, subtle `spring` effects for tactile feedback.
globalPrinciples.framerate: Optimized for 60fps across devices to ensure fluid, premium execution.

heroEntrance.description: The entire hero section enters the viewport with a swift, subtle upward push and a soft fade-in, as if being revealed. The video loop starts playing immediately.

sectionTransitions.description: Vertical scrolling triggers `slick, split-second cuts` between major sections, resembling rapid camera changes in a film, ensuring the pace remains energetic. These transitions may involve subtle, full-width content wipes or swift fades.

microInteractionsMotion.description: A subtle, CSS-driven ambient steam mist rises and dissipates slowly behind the Chai menu panel on hover. The mist is semi-transparent, using `linear-gradient` and `animation` properties to simulate natural, curling steam. Originates from the base of the image.
microInteractionsMotion.properties: Opacity, vertical translation, slight radial blur, color #FFFFFF (with low opacity).

microInteractionsMotion.description: Activating the 'Late-Night Mode' switch triggers a smooth, full-screen color overlay transition from the primary background (`#0F0F10`) to a deeper, more saturated dark tone with an ambient glow of `#FF5E00` emanating from the edges of content blocks. UI elements such as text and active indicators subtly shift their intensity and hue to complement the 'street neon' atmosphere. The toggle itself might emit a temporary 'ping' animation with a neon ripple.

Clicking a menu item or a navigation link results in an `instant-load` experience where the new content snaps into place with minimal transition time. Any intermediate loaders are quick, full-screen blurs that disappear within 100ms. This mimics the rapid service and operational efficiency of the physical cafe, emphasizing 'no waiting time'.

Hovering over a Shawarma card: a subtle `box-shadow` with `#FF9F0A` and a light `text-shadow` on the title creates a soft incandescent glow. Simultaneously, a very faint, almost subliminal crackling/sizzling sound effect plays (brief, less than 1 second, with controlled volume), enhancing the sensory experience.

primaryBackground.description: Deep charcoal, mimicking the Pune night sky over Lane 5. Provides a high-contrast canvas for vibrant accents to pop, creating depth and a late-night atmosphere.

accentAmber.description: Warm incandescent overhead lighting and fresh glowing embers. Used for key interactive elements, subtle highlights, and focal points in food photography, evoking warmth and freshness.

teaBrown.description: Rich, earthy, and aromatic tone of boiling Irani Chai. Utilized for secondary text, subtle background textures, and illustrative elements related to warmth and comfort.

streetNeonOrange.description: High-intensity neon warmth reminiscent of the late-night storefront glow. Reserved for critical calls-to-action, 'LIVE' indicators, and dynamic UI elements requiring immediate attention.

displayFont.usage: Impactful, high-volume headers ('The Core Rotation', main titles), mimicking fast-paced, high-turnaround urban energy. Used for maximum legibility and assertive communication.

bodyFont.usage: Industrial, utilitarian layouts for menu descriptions, footer details, and operational information. Mimics quick receipts, clean execution, and no-nonsense menu structures. Ensures clarity and a modern, functional aesthetic.

lightingAndAtmosphere.environment: High-contrast night-time depth is paramount. Dark backdrops (`#0F0F10`) are leveraged to make steam from boiling chai and glowing shawarma spit-fires visually pop with dramatic intensity. Digital lighting will emulate incandescent warmth and neon glows, creating focal points against ambient darkness.
lightingAndAtmosphere.photographyDirection: Emphasis on `macro shots` and candid, raw kitchen movement. Rich, dripping garlic sauce, seasoned chicken spinning on the rotisserie (showing texture, marinade), crisp toasted bun maska crusts (detail of butter melting), and natural steam curling off freshly poured clay cups of chai. Images should feel un-staged, captured in the moment, highlighting texture, temperature, and action over static perfection. Bokeh effects to emphasize foreground food elements.
lightingAndAtmosphere.cinematicTransitions: Beyond UI transitions, this refers to visual storytelling. Photography and video will be edited to incorporate `slick, split-second cuts` from high-energy street motion (e.g., blur of passing vehicles, crowd bustle) to `slow-motion macro-frames` of food preparation (e.g., a drop of oil hitting a hot surface, spices being sprinkled). This juxtaposition builds anticipation and highlights the craft.

technicalDirection.frontendFramework: React (with Next.js for SSR/SSG) or Vue (with Nuxt.js) for robust component architecture, state management, and performance-optimized rendering of dynamic content and rich media. Enables efficient development of complex UI and motion systems.
technicalDirection.motionLibrary: GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform) or Framer Motion for sophisticated, high-performance animation orchestration, scroll-triggered animations, and complex micro-interactions (steam, neon glow effects). Ensures smooth 60fps animations across devices.
technicalDirection.mediaOptimization: Utilize modern video codecs (e.g., WebM, H.265) and responsive image formats (WebP) with adaptive loading (lazy loading, CDN delivery) for hero videos and high-res photography. Implement `<video>` tag with `muted autoplay loop playsinline` for hero, with a low-res placeholder image until loaded.
technicalDirection.realTimeDataIntegration: API endpoints for operational status ('LIVE: SERVING UNTIL 3:00 AM'), customer sentiment highlights (e.g., integration with social media APIs or a curated content management system), and popular hours data. WebSockets or server-sent events for critical, dynamic updates.
technicalDirection.geolocationServices: Browser's Geolocation API combined with Google Maps API (or similar) for 'Quick-Route Drive-Through' functionality, location-aware CTAs, and rendering the interactive map.
technicalDirection.audioIntegration: Strategic, non-intrusive audio implementation using Web Audio API for micro-interactions (sizzle) with careful volume control and user-preference settings (on/off toggle). Default muted.
technicalDirection.accessibility: Semantic HTML, ARIA attributes for dynamic content and interactive elements, keyboard navigation support, and sufficient color contrast ratios to meet WCAG standards, especially for high-contrast dark themes.
technicalDirection.performanceMonitoring: Implement Lighthouse audits, Web Vitals monitoring, and CDN for static assets to ensure fast load times and smooth interactions crucial for a 'fast turnaround' experience.

items: **Core Homepage Hero:** Fully functional autoplay video loop, dynamic 'LIVE' badge with real-time status, and primary CTA for Dine-in/Drive-through/Delivery with basic location logic.

**'The Core Rotation' Section:** High-contrast cards for Shawarma, Irani Chai, Bun Maska, Peri Peri Shawarma with macro photography and initial descriptions. Implement horizontal scroll and basic hover-triggered steam/sizzle micro-interactions.
**Utilitarian Footer:** Accurate operating hours, phone, address, and quick-route directions. Ensure data is directly callable/mappable.
**Base Visual & Motion Systems:** Implement primary color palette, typography, and global motion principles. Optimize initial load performance for rich media.
**'Lane No. 5 Energy' Section:** Integration of real-time social media snippets and live data visualization of popular hours. Fully interactive embedded map with routing.
**Enhanced Motion Choreography:** Refine scroll-triggered animations between all major sections. Implement 'Fast Turnaround Navigation' across the site.
**'Late-Night Mode' Toggle:** Fully functional interactive switch that applies the site-wide atmospheric lighting change.
**Refined Sensory Interactions:** Expand steam and sizzle effects with more naturalistic animations. Implement subtle, background street ambiance soundscapes (user-toggleable).
**Ordering System Integration:** Deeper integration with third-party delivery platforms and/or a simplified in-house pickup ordering flow.
**Content Refresh System:** Establish a pipeline for easy updates of new macro photography, real customer content, and specials.
**Performance & Accessibility Audits:** Ongoing optimization and improvements based on user feedback and technical performance metrics.
**Seasonal Specials/Events:** Integrate dynamic content slots for limited-time offerings that maintain the cinematic and authentic visual language.
